DECLARATION RE REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY TELEPHONE. FILED BY PLAINTIFF WHEELS FINANCIAL GROUP, LLC. DBA LOANMART

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-17-2020 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF WHEELS FINANCIAL GROUP, LLC, REPRESENTED BY DINUSHI GUNARATNE, COLLECTIONS REPRESENTATIVE, VIA COURTCALL IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT JAIME LEGASPI SANTA MARIA IS NOT PRESENT. COURT HEARS PLAINTIFF'S TESTIMONY. PLAINTIFF'S SUBMITTED EXHIBITS RETAINED. COMMISSIONER PANG LY; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-18-2020 - CONTINUED ON COURT'S OWN MOTION TO SEP-17-2020 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WHEELS FINANCIAL GROUP, LLC. DBA LOANMART RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MARIA, JAIME LEGASPI SANTA $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $185.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,685.50 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
